items.title_en: Five patients recover from Ebola in DR Congo and leave hospital

items.desc_zh: 到目前为止，已有五名男子从狭窄、被洪水淹没的洞穴中被救出，但仍在努力寻找另外两人。

items.title_en: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
items.title_zh: 法国欧冠骚乱数百人被捕，数十名警察受伤
items.desc_en: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.
items.desc_zh: 与警察发生冲突，造成近 800 人被捕，造成 219 人受伤，其中包括 57 名警察。

items.title_en: South Africa made to look like fools after World Cup visa issues, says minister
items.title_zh: 部长表示，世界杯签证问题后，南非看起来像个傻瓜
items.desc_en: According to media reports, the team's departure for Mexico on Sunday has been delayed due to an "administrative bungle".
items.desc_zh: 据媒体报道，由于“行政失误”，球队周日出发前往墨西哥的计划被推迟。

items.title_zh: Tokenwise
items.desc_en: A smart LLM proxy that shows where you're overpaying
items.desc_zh: 智能 LLM 代理可显示您在哪些方面多付了费用

items.title_en: The great Indo-Pacific hedge - deeper defence ties as US doubts grow and China ascends - Reuters
items.title_zh: 印太大对冲——随着美国疑虑加剧和中国崛起，防务关系加深 - 路透中文网
items.desc_en: The great Indo-Pacific hedge - deeper defence ties as US doubts grow and China ascends  ReutersDefense spending, China in Asia and lessons from Ukraine: Takeways from the 2026 IISS Shangri-La Dialogue
items.desc_zh: 印太大对冲——随着美国疑虑加剧和中国崛起，防务关系加深路透国防开支、中国在亚洲以及乌克兰的教训：2026 年国际战略研究所香格里拉对话的要点

items.title_en: Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
items.title_zh: 日本防卫大臣否认军国主义并批评中国“庞大的武库”
items.desc_en: Shinjiro Koizumi makes some of Tokyo's most pointed remarks yet in the dispute over Japan's military build-up.
items.desc_zh: 在有关日本军力建设的争端中，小泉进次郎发表了东京迄今为止最尖锐的言论。

items.title_en: Typeahead
items.title_zh: Typeahead
items.desc_en: AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac
items.desc_zh: Mac 上每个应用程序的 AI 自动完成功能

items.title_en: Berkshire trails red-hot S&P 500 by biggest margin so far this year
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔今年迄今为止以最大差距落后于炙手可热的标准普尔 500 指数
items.desc_en: Berkshire's widely held B shares are now running 16.3 percentage points behind the benchmark index year-to-date, the biggest gap so far in 2026.
items.desc_zh: 今年迄今为止，伯克希尔哈撒韦广泛持有的 B 股目前落后基准指数 16.3 个百分点，这是 2026 年迄今为止的最大差距。

items.title_en: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
items.title_zh: 在军费开支激增之后，欧洲国防股正在降温。接下来是这样的
items.desc_en: Analysts see 2026 as a period of consolidation for the sector, as excitement over Europe's increased defense budget is replaced by company-specific drivers.
items.desc_zh: 分析师认为 2026 年是该行业的整合期，因为欧洲国防预算增加带来的兴奋被公司特定的驱动因素所取代。

items.title_zh: NetworkSpy
items.desc_en: HTTP(s) proxy debugger with custom viewer
items.desc_zh: 带有自定义查看器的 HTTP(s) 代理调试器

items.title_zh: Tabstack Web Research
items.desc_en: Run a research agent with cited answers in a single API call
items.desc_zh: 在单个 API 调用中运行带有引用答案的研究代理

items.title_en: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.desc_en: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.desc_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.title_en: Sentinel
items.title_zh: Sentinel
items.desc_en: Control your robots from anywhere in the world
items.desc_zh: 从世界任何地方控制您的机器人

items.title_en: Emily by Co-Desk
items.title_zh: Emily by Co-Desk
items.desc_en: Voice AI copilot for coworking & coliving operators
items.desc_zh: 面向联合办公和共享居住运营商的语音 AI 副驾驶

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.title_en: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
items.title_zh: Meta 多次因 Facebook 和 Instagram 用户禁令而冷落欧盟机构
items.desc_en: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.
items.desc_zh: 数百名用户联系了 BBC，声称他们被错误地禁止访问这些网站。

items.title_en: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控利用内部数据赚取 120 万美元赌注
items.desc_en: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.
items.desc_zh: 这名谷歌长期员工因涉嫌违反内幕交易法而在纽约受到指控。

items.title_en: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.desc_zh: 当人工智能走进学校课堂后，老师的角色是什么？

items.title_en: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.title_en: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
items.title_zh: 味道像奶油冻的水果的兴起
items.desc_en: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.
items.desc_zh: 番荔枝植物因其耐寒性而受到重视，但出口其精致的果实却很困难。

items.desc_zh: 文本中的人工智能可以完成工作

items.title_en: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
items.title_zh: 人工智能可能会加速寻找治疗大脑疾病的药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。
